traits.name: Kenku Training
traits.desc: Proficiency in two of: Acrobatics, Deception, Stealth, Sleight of Hand.

traits.name: Mimicry
traits.desc: Mimic sounds and voices you've heard.

class_features.name: Rage
class_features.desc: Enter a rage as a bonus action. Advantage on STR checks and saves, +2 melee damage, resistance to B/P/S damage. Lasts 1 minute. Uses: 2 at 1st, scaling up.

class_features.name: Unarmored Defense
class_features.desc: While not wearing armor, AC = 10 + DEX modifier + CON modifier.

class_features.name: Reckless Attack
class_features.desc: When making first attack on your turn, attack with advantage. Attacks against you have advantage until your next turn.

class_features.name: Danger Sense
class_features.desc: Advantage on DEX saves against effects you can see. Doesn't work if blinded, deafened, or incapacitated.

class_features.name: Primal Path
class_features.desc: Choose your subclass path.

class_features.name: Extra Attack
class_features.desc: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

class_features.name: Fast Movement
class_features.desc: Speed increases by 10 ft. while not wearing heavy armor.

class_features.name: Feral Instinct
class_features.desc: Advantage on Initiative. Can enter rage to act normally if surprised.

class_features.name: Brutal Critical
class_features.desc: Roll one extra weapon damage die on a critical hit.

class_features.name: Relentless Rage
class_features.desc: When reduced to 0 HP while raging, make DC 10 CON save to drop to 1 HP instead.

class_features.name: Persistent Rage
class_features.desc: Rage only ends early if you fall unconscious or choose to end it.

class_features.name: Primal Champion
class_features.desc: STR and CON each increase by 4 (max 24).

class_features.name: Bardic Inspiration
class_features.desc: Use bonus action to grant creature within 60 ft. a Bardic Inspiration die (d6). They can add it to one ability check, attack, or save within 10 min. Uses = CHA modifier (min 1), regain on long rest.

class_features.name: Jack of All Trades
class_features.desc: Add half your proficiency bonus (rounded down) to any ability check you don't add your full proficiency bonus to.

class_features.name: Song of Rest
class_features.desc: If you or friendly creatures regain HP at end of a short rest, each can roll one extra Hit Die.

class_features.name: Bard College
class_features.desc: Choose your bard college subclass.

class_features.name: Expertise
class_features.desc: Double proficiency bonus on two skill proficiencies of your choice (again at 10th level).

class_features.name: Font of Inspiration
class_features.desc: Regain all uses of Bardic Inspiration after a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Countercharm
class_features.desc: As action, start performance that can end charmed/frightened on you and friendly creatures within 30 ft. who can hear you.

class_features.name: Magical Secrets
class_features.desc: Choose two spells from any class spell list. They count as bard spells for you. Gain two more at 14th and 18th level.

class_features.name: Superior Inspiration
class_features.desc: If you have no uses of Bardic Inspiration left, regain one use when you roll initiative.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.desc: Prepare WIS modifier + cleric level spells each day from cleric list. Ritual casting. Holy symbol as focus.

class_features.name: Divine Domain
class_features.desc: Choose a domain subclass granting bonus spells, proficiencies, and features.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity
class_features.desc: Use Channel Divinity feature of your domain (and Turn Undead). Once per short or long rest (twice from 6th, three times from 18th).

class_features.name: Turn Undead
class_features.desc: Each undead within 30 ft. that can hear/see you must make WIS save or be turned for 1 minute.

class_features.name: Destroy Undead
class_features.desc: Turned undead of CR 1/2 or lower is destroyed outright. Threshold increases at higher levels.

class_features.name: Divine Intervention
class_features.desc: Call on your deity to intervene. Roll d100; if result ≤ cleric level, deity intervenes. Recharges on long rest. Auto-succeeds at 20th level.

class_features.name: Druidic
class_features.desc: Know the Druidic secret language. Can leave messages in nature only druids can decode.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.desc: Prepare WIS modifier + druid level spells. Ritual casting. Druidic focus or component pouch.

class_features.name: Wild Shape
class_features.desc: Use action to magically assume beast shape (CR limit scales with level). Twice per short or long rest.

class_features.name: Druid Circle
class_features.desc: Choose your circle subclass.

class_features.name: Wild Shape Improvement
class_features.desc: Can now assume CR 1/2 beast shapes with a swim speed.

class_features.name: Wild Shape Improvement
class_features.desc: Can now assume CR 1 beast shapes with a fly speed.

class_features.name: Timeless Body
class_features.desc: Age at 1/10 normal rate and immune to magical aging.

class_features.name: Beast Spells
class_features.desc: Can cast spells while in Wild Shape form.

class_features.name: Archdruid
class_features.desc: Can use Wild Shape an unlimited number of times.

class_features.name: Fighting Style
class_features.desc: Choose a fighting style: Archery (+2 ranged attacks), Defense (+1 AC in armor), Dueling (+2 damage with one-handed weapon), Great Weapon Fighting (reroll 1s/2s on damage), Protection (impose disadvantage on attack), Two-Weapon Fighting (add ability mod to off-hand).

class_features.name: Second Wind
class_features.desc: Use bonus action to regain 1d10 + fighter level HP. Recharges on short or long rest.

class_features.name: Action Surge
class_features.desc: On your turn, take one additional action. Twice per short or long rest from 17th level; once otherwise.

class_features.name: Martial Archetype
class_features.desc: Choose your fighter subclass.

class_features.name: Extra Attack
class_features.desc: Attack twice when you take the Attack action (three times at 11th, four times at 20th).

class_features.name: Indomitable
class_features.desc: Reroll a failed saving throw. Uses: 1 at 9th, 2 at 13th, 3 at 17th. Recharges on long rest.

class_features.name: Unarmored Defense
class_features.desc: While wearing no armor and not wielding a shield, AC = 10 + DEX modifier + WIS modifier.

class_features.name: Martial Arts
class_features.desc: Use DEX for unarmed strikes and monk weapons. Unarmed strike die: d4 at 1st, d6 at 5th, d8 at 11th, d10 at 17th. Bonus action unarmed strike.

class_features.name: Ki
class_features.desc: Gain ki points equal to your monk level. Spend to use Flurry of Blows, Patient Defense, Step of the Wind. Recharge on short or long rest.

class_features.name: Unarmored Movement
class_features.desc: Speed increases by 10 ft. Scales: +10 at 2nd, +15 at 6th, +20 at 10th, +25 at 14th, +30 at 18th.

class_features.name: Deflect Missiles
class_features.desc: Use reaction when hit by a ranged weapon attack to reduce damage. If reduced to 0, catch the projectile and throw it back.

class_features.name: Monastic Tradition
class_features.desc: Choose your monk subclass.

class_features.name: Slow Fall
class_features.desc: Use reaction to reduce falling damage by 5× monk level.

class_features.name: Extra Attack
class_features.desc: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

class_features.name: Stunning Strike
class_features.desc: Spend 1 ki after hitting to force CON save. On failure, target is stunned until end of your next turn.

class_features.name: Ki-Empowered Strikes
class_features.desc: Unarmed strikes count as magical for overcoming resistance.

class_features.name: Evasion
class_features.desc: DEX save against effects for half damage: take no damage on success, half on failure.

class_features.name: Stillness of Mind
class_features.desc: Use action to end charmed or frightened condition on yourself.

class_features.name: Purity of Body
class_features.desc: Immune to disease and poison.

class_features.name: Tongue of the Sun and Moon
class_features.desc: Understand all spoken languages; all creatures understand your speech.

class_features.name: Diamond Soul
class_features.desc: Proficiency in all saving throws. Spend 1 ki to reroll a failed save.

class_features.name: Timeless Body
class_features.desc: No longer need food or water; age at 1/10 normal rate.

class_features.name: Empty Body
class_features.desc: Spend 4 ki to become invisible for 1 minute with resistance to all but force damage. Spend 8 ki to cast Astral Projection.

class_features.name: Perfect Self
class_features.desc: Regain 4 ki points when you roll initiative and have none remaining.

class_features.name: Divine Sense
class_features.desc: As action, detect celestials, fiends, and undead within 60 ft. Uses = 1 + CHA modifier per long rest.

class_features.name: Lay on Hands
class_features.desc: Pool of healing = 5× paladin level. Use action to restore HP (1 HP per point) or cure disease/poison (5 points).

class_features.name: Fighting Style
class_features.desc: Choose a paladin fighting style.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.desc: Prepare CHA modifier + half paladin level (rounded down) spells.

class_features.name: Divine Smite
class_features.desc: When you hit with a melee weapon, expend a spell slot to deal extra radiant damage: 2d8 per 1st-level slot + 1d8 per slot level above 1st (max 5d8). +1d8 vs. undead/fiends.

class_features.name: Divine Health
class_features.desc: Immune to disease.

class_features.name: Sacred Oath
class_features.desc: Choose your subclass. Grants Channel Divinity options and oath spells.

class_features.name: Extra Attack
class_features.desc: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

class_features.name: Aura of Protection
class_features.desc: You and friendly creatures within 10 ft. add your CHA modifier (min +1) to saving throws while you're conscious. Extends to 30 ft. at 18th level.

class_features.name: Aura of Courage
class_features.desc: You and friendly creatures within 10 ft. can't be frightened while you're conscious. Extends to 30 ft. at 18th.

class_features.name: Divine Health
class_features.desc: Immune to disease.

class_features.name: Improved Divine Smite
class_features.desc: Whenever you hit with a melee weapon, deal an extra 1d8 radiant damage.

class_features.name: Cleansing Touch
class_features.desc: Use action to end one spell on yourself or a willing creature. Uses = CHA modifier per long rest.

class_features.name: Favored Enemy
class_features.desc: Choose a type of favored enemy (aberrations, beasts, celestials, constructs, dragons, elementals, fey, fiends, giants, monstrosities, oozes, plants, undead, or two humanoid races). Advantage on Survival checks to track, advantage on INT checks to recall info. Learn one language they speak.

class_features.name: Natural Explorer
class_features.desc: Choose a favored terrain type. Double proficiency on INT and WIS checks about it; difficult terrain doesn't slow your group; you can't be surprised if alert; advantage on Initiative; extra travel benefits.

class_features.name: Fighting Style
class_features.desc: Choose a ranger fighting style.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.desc: Prepare WIS-based spells from ranger list.

class_features.name: Ranger Archetype
class_features.desc: Choose your ranger subclass.

class_features.name: Primeval Awareness
class_features.desc: Expend one spell slot to sense presence of certain creature types within 1 mile (6 miles in favored terrain) for 1 minute.

class_features.name: Extra Attack
class_features.desc: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

class_features.name: Land's Stride
class_features.desc: Moving through nonmagical difficult terrain costs no extra movement. Advantage on saves against magical plants.

class_features.name: Hide in Plain Sight
class_features.desc: Spend 1 minute camouflaging yourself. While still, +10 to Stealth and can't be detected by nonmagical means.

class_features.name: Vanish
class_features.desc: Can use Hide as a bonus action. Can't be tracked by nonmagical means.

class_features.name: Feral Senses
class_features.desc: Awareness of hidden creatures within 30 ft. No disadvantage when attacking invisible creatures you're aware of.

class_features.name: Foe Slayer
class_features.desc: Once per turn, add WIS modifier to attack or damage roll against a favored enemy.

class_features.name: Expertise
class_features.desc: Double proficiency bonus on two skill proficiencies or one skill and thieves' tools. Gain two more at 6th level.

class_features.name: Sneak Attack
class_features.desc: Once per turn, deal extra damage to a creature you have advantage against, or when an ally is adjacent to target: 1d6 at 1st, +1d6 every 2 levels (max 10d6 at 19th).

class_features.name: Thieves' Cant
class_features.desc: Secret mix of dialect, jargon, and code used among rogues.

class_features.name: Cunning Action
class_features.desc: Use bonus action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide.

class_features.name: Roguish Archetype
class_features.desc: Choose your rogue subclass.

class_features.name: Uncanny Dodge
class_features.desc: Use reaction when hit by attacker you can see to halve the damage.

class_features.name: Evasion
class_features.desc: DEX saves: take no damage on success, half on failure.

class_features.name: Reliable Talent
class_features.desc: When you make an ability check with proficiency, treat rolls of 9 or lower as 10.

class_features.name: Blindsense
class_features.desc: If you can hear, you're aware of hidden or invisible creatures within 10 ft.

class_features.name: Slippery Mind
class_features.desc: Gain proficiency in WIS saving throws.

class_features.name: Elusive
class_features.desc: No attack roll has advantage against you while you're not incapacitated.

class_features.name: Stroke of Luck
class_features.desc: Turn a missed attack into a hit or a failed ability check into a 20. Recharges on short or long rest.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.desc: CHA-based spontaneous casting. Known spells (not prepared). Arcane focus.

class_features.name: Sorcerous Origin
class_features.desc: Choose your subclass, which grants additional features and spells.

class_features.name: Font of Magic
class_features.desc: Gain sorcery points equal to your sorcerer level. Spend to create spell slots or fuel Metamagic.

class_features.name: Metamagic
class_features.desc: Choose 2 Metamagic options (gain more at 10th and 17th): Careful, Distant, Empowered, Extended, Heightened, Quickened, Subtle, Twinned.

class_features.name: Sorcerous Restoration
class_features.desc: Regain 4 expended sorcery points whenever you finish a short rest.

class_features.name: Otherworldly Patron
class_features.desc: Choose your warlock patron subclass. Grants expanded spell list and features.

class_features.name: Pact Magic
class_features.desc: CHA-based spellcasting. All slots are the same level (scales with level). Regain all slots on short or long rest.

class_features.name: Eldritch Invocations
class_features.desc: Choose 2 invocations (gain more as you level). Customize your warlock with persistent bonuses.

class_features.name: Pact Boon
class_features.desc: Choose Pact of the Chain (familiar), Pact of the Blade (magical weapon), or Pact of the Tome (Book of Shadows with 3 cantrips).

class_features.name: Mystic Arcanum
class_features.desc: Choose one 6th-level spell. Cast it once per long rest without a spell slot. Gain higher arcana at 13th (7th), 15th (8th), 17th (9th).

class_features.name: Eldritch Master
class_features.desc: Spend 1 minute entreating your patron to regain all expended spell slots. Once per long rest.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.desc: INT-based spellcasting from a spellbook. Prepare INT modifier + wizard level spells each day. Ritual casting from spellbook. Arcane focus or component pouch.

class_features.name: Arcane Recovery
class_features.desc: Once per day during a short rest, recover spell slots with total levels ≤ half your wizard level (rounded up). Slots recovered must be 5th level or lower.

class_features.name: Arcane Tradition
class_features.desc: Choose your wizard subclass (school of magic or other tradition).

class_features.name: Spell Mastery
class_features.desc: Choose a 1st-level and a 2nd-level spell. You can cast them at their lowest level without expending spell slots.

class_features.name: Signature Spells
class_features.desc: Choose two 3rd-level spells. You always have them prepared and can cast each once per short rest without expending a spell slot.

backgrounds.name: Acolyte
personality_traits: I idolize a particular hero of my faith.
I can find common ground between the fiercest enemies.
I see omens in every event and action.
Nothing can shake my optimistic attitude.
ideals: Tradition. Ancient traditions must be preserved.
Charity. I always help those in need.
Change. We must help bring about change.
Power. I hope to one day rise to the top.
bonds: I would die to recover an ancient relic.
I will someday get revenge on the corrupt temple hierarchy.
I owe my life to the priest who took me in.
Everything I do is for the common people.
flaws: I judge others harshly and myself even more so.
I put too much trust in those in power.
My piety sometimes leads me to blindly trust those that profess faith.
I am inflexible in my thinking.

backgrounds.name: Charlatan
personality_traits: I fall in and out of love easily.
I have a joke for every occasion.
Flattery is my preferred trick.
I'm a born gambler.
ideals: Independence. I am a free spirit.
Fairness. I never target people who can't afford to lose.
Creativity. I never run the same con twice.
Friendship. Material goods come and go, but friends are forever.
bonds: I fleeced the wrong person and need to make it right.
I owe everything to my mentor.
Somewhere out there I have a child who doesn't know me.
I come from a noble family.
flaws: I can't resist a pretty face.
I'm always in debt.
I'm convinced that no one could ever fool me.
I hate to admit it and will hide it whenever possible, but I'm a coward.

backgrounds.name: Criminal
personality_traits: I always have a plan for when things go wrong.
I am always calm, no matter the situation.
The first thing I do in a new place is note the exits.
I would rather make a new friend than an enemy.
ideals: Honor. I don't steal from others who need it.
Freedom. Chains are meant to be broken.
Charity. I steal from the wealthy so that I can help people in need.
Redemption. There's a spark of good in everyone.
bonds: I'm trying to pay off an old debt I owe to a generous benefactor.
My ill-gotten gains go to support my family.
Something important was taken from me and I aim to steal it back.
I will become the greatest thief that ever lived.
flaws: When I see something valuable I can't think about anything but how to steal it.
When faced with a choice between money and friends, I choose money.
If there's a plan, I'll forget it. If I don't forget it, I'll ignore it.
I have a 'tell' that reveals when I'm lying.

backgrounds.name: Entertainer
personality_traits: I know a story relevant to almost every situation.
Whenever I come to a new place I collect local rumors.
I'm a hopeless romantic.
Nobody stays angry at me for long.
ideals: Beauty. When I perform, I make the world better than it was.
Tradition. The stories, legends, and songs of the past must never be forgotten.
Creativity. The world is in need of new ideas and bold action.
Honesty. Art should reflect the soul.
bonds: My instrument is my most treasured possession.
Someone stole my mentor's music and I want justice.
I want to be famous, whatever it takes.
I idolize a hero and measure my deeds against that person's.
flaws: I'll do anything to win fame and renown.
I'm a sucker for a pretty face.
A scandal prevents me from ever going home.
I once satirized a noble who now wants my head.

backgrounds.name: Folk Hero
personality_traits: I judge people by their actions, not their words.
If someone is in trouble, I'm always ready to lend help.
When I set my mind to something, I follow through.
I have a strong sense of fair play.
ideals: Respect. People deserve to be treated with dignity.
Fairness. No one should get preferential treatment before the law.
Freedom. Tyrants must not be allowed to oppress the people.
Sincerity. There's no good in pretending to be something I'm not.
bonds: I have a family, but I have no idea where they are.
I worked the land, I love the land, and I will protect the land.
A proud noble once gave me a horrible beating, and I will take my revenge.
My tools are symbols of my past life.
flaws: The tyrant who rules my land will stop at nothing to see me killed.
I'm convinced of the significance of my destiny.
Flattery and admiration are my weakness.
I have trouble trusting in my allies.

backgrounds.name: Guild Artisan
personality_traits: I believe that anything worth doing is worth doing right.
I'm rude to people who lack my commitment to hard work.
I like to talk at length about my profession.
I don't part with my money easily.
ideals: Community. It is the duty of all to strengthen the bonds of community.
Generosity. My talents were given to me so that I could use them to benefit the world.
Freedom. Everyone should be free to pursue his or her livelihood.
Aspiration. I work hard to be the best there is at my craft.
bonds: The workshop where I learned my trade is the most important place in the world.
I owe my guild a great debt.
I pursue wealth to secure someone's love.
One day I will return to my guild and prove that I am the greatest artisan.
flaws: I'll do anything to get my hands on something rare.
I'm quick to assume that someone is trying to cheat me.
No one must ever learn that I once stole from a guild.
I'm never satisfied with what I have.

backgrounds.name: Hermit
personality_traits: I've been isolated for so long that I rarely speak.
I am utterly serene, even in the face of disaster.
The leader of my community had something important to say.
I am working on a grand philosophical theory.
ideals: Greater Good. My gifts are meant to be shared with all.
Logic. Emotions must not cloud our logical thinking.
Free Thinking. Inquiry and curiosity are pillars of progress.
Self-Knowledge. If you know yourself, there's nothing left to know.
bonds: Nothing is more important than the other members of my hermitage.
I entered seclusion to hide from the ones who might still be hunting me.
I'm still seeking the enlightenment I pursued in my seclusion.
My isolation gave me great insight into a great evil that I must destroy.
flaws: Now that I've returned to the world, I enjoy its delights a little too much.
I harbor dark, bloodthirsty thoughts that my isolation failed to quell.
I am dogmatic in my thoughts and philosophy.
I let my need to win arguments overshadow friendships.

backgrounds.name: Noble
personality_traits: My eloquent flattery makes everyone I talk to feel like the most wonderful and important person.
The common folk love me for my kindness.
I take great pains to always look my best.
I don't like to get my hands dirty.
ideals: Respect. Respect is due to me because of my position.
Responsibility. It is my duty to respect the authority of those above me.
Independence. I must prove that I can handle myself without the coddling of my family.
Power. If I can attain more power, no one will tell me what to do.
bonds: I will face any challenge to win the approval of my family.
My house's alliance with another noble family must be sustained.
Nothing is more important than the other members of my family.
I am in love with the heir of a family that my family despises.
flaws: I secretly believe that everyone is beneath me.
I hide a truly scandalous secret.
I too often hear veiled insults and threats in every word.
I have an insatiable desire for carnal pleasures.

backgrounds.name: Outlander
personality_traits: I'm driven by a wanderlust that led me away from home.
I watch over my friends as if they were a litter of newborn pups.
I once ran 25 miles without stopping.
I have a lesson for every situation.
ideals: Change. Life is like the seasons, in constant change.
Greater Good. It is each person's responsibility to make the most happiness.
Honor. If I dishonor myself, I dishonor my whole clan.
Might. The strongest are meant to rule.
bonds: My family, clan, or tribe is the most important thing in my life.
An injury to the unspoiled wilderness is an injury to me.
I will bring terrible wrath down on the evildoers who destroyed my homeland.
I am the last of my tribe.
flaws: I am too enamored of ale, wine, and other intoxicants.
There's no room for caution in a life lived to the fullest.
I remember every insult I've received and will nurse the grudge forever.
I am slow to trust members of other races.

backgrounds.name: Sage
personality_traits: I use polysyllabic words that convey the impression of great erudition.
I've read every book in the world's greatest libraries.
I'm used to helping out those who aren't as smart as I am.
There's nothing I like more than a good mystery.
ideals: Knowledge. The path to power is through knowledge.
Beauty. What is beautiful points us beyond itself toward what is true.
Logic. Emotions must not cloud our logical thinking.
No Limits. Nothing should fetter the infinite possibility inherent in all existence.
bonds: It is my duty to protect my students.
I have an ancient text that holds terrible secrets.
I have been searching my whole life for the answer to a certain question.
I sold my soul for knowledge.
flaws: I am easily distracted by the promise of information.
Most people scream when they should be listening.
Unlocking an ancient mystery is worth the price of civilization.
I overlook obvious solutions in favor of complicated ones.

backgrounds.name: Sailor
personality_traits: My friends know they can rely on me.
I work hard so that I can play hard when the work is done.
I enjoy sailing into new ports and making new friends.
I stretch the truth for the sake of a good story.
ideals: Respect. The thing that keeps a ship together is mutual respect.
Fairness. We all do the work, so we all share in the rewards.
Freedom. The sea is freedom, the freedom to go anywhere.
Mastery. I'm a predator, and the other ships on the sea are my prey.
bonds: I'm loyal to my captain first, everything else second.
The ship is most important, crewmates and cargo are secondary.
I'll always remember my first ship.
In a harbor town I have a paramour whose eyes nearly stole me from the sea.
flaws: I follow orders, even if I think they're wrong.
I'll say anything to avoid having to do extra work.
Once someone questions my courage I never back down.
Once I start drinking it's hard for me to stop.

backgrounds.name: Soldier
personality_traits: I'm always polite and respectful.
I'm haunted by memories of war.
I've lost too many friends and I'm slow to make new ones.
I'm full of inspiring and cautionary tales.
ideals: Greater Good. Our lot is to lay down our lives in defense of others.
Responsibility. I do what I must and obey just authority.
Independence. When people follow orders blindly they embrace tyranny.
Might. In life as in war the stronger force wins.
bonds: I would still lay down my life for the people I served with.
Someone saved my life on the battlefield and I won't rest until I've repaid the debt.
My honor is my life.
I'll never forget the crushing defeat my company suffered.
flaws: The monstrous enemy we faced in battle still leaves me quivering with fear.
I have little respect for anyone who is not a proven warrior.
Made a terrible mistake in battle that cost many lives.
My hatred of my enemies is blind and unreasoning.

backgrounds.name: Urchin
personality_traits: I hide scraps of food and trinkets in my pockets.
I ask a lot of questions.
I like to squeeze into small places.
I sleep with my back to a wall.
ideals: Respect. All people deserve to be treated with dignity.
Community. We have to take care of each other.
Change. The low are lifted up and the powerful fall.
Retribution. The rich need to be shown what life and death are like.
bonds: My town or city is my home and I'll fight to defend it.
I sponsor an orphanage to keep others from enduring what I did.
I owe a debt I can never repay to the person who showed me compassion.
I escaped my life of poverty by robbing an important person.
flaws: Gold seems like a lot of money to me.
I will do anything to get my hands on something rare or priceless.
I'd rather kill someone in their sleep than fight fair.
It's not stealing if I need it more than someone else.

spells.name: Acid Splash
spells.desc: Hurl a bubble of acid. One or two creatures within 5 ft must succeed on a DEX save or take 1d6 acid damage. Damage increases at higher levels.

spells.name: Blade Ward
spells.desc: Extend your hand and trace a sigil of warding. Until end of your next turn, you have resistance against bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage dealt by weapon attacks.

spells.name: Chill Touch
spells.desc: Create a ghostly hand. Make a ranged spell attack. On hit, 1d8 necrotic damage and target can't regain HP until start of your next turn. Damage increases at higher levels.

spells.name: Dancing Lights
spells.desc: Create up to four torch-sized lights. Each sheds dim light in a 10-foot radius. Can combine into a Medium humanoid shape. Bonus action to move up to 60 feet.

spells.name: Druidcraft
spells.desc: Whispering to the spirits of nature. Predict weather, make flower blossom, light/snuff small flame, or cause sensory harmless effect.

spells.name: Eldritch Blast
spells.desc: A beam of crackling energy. Make a ranged spell attack. On hit, 1d10 force damage. Creates additional beams at higher character levels.

spells.name: Fire Bolt
spells.desc: Hurl a mote of fire. Make a ranged spell attack. On hit, 1d10 fire damage. Flammable objects hit ignite. Damage increases at higher levels.

spells.name: Friends
spells.desc: Advantage on all CHA checks against one non-hostile creature. When the spell ends, the creature knows it was charmed.

spells.name: Guidance
spells.desc: Touch willing creature. Once before spell ends, target can roll a d4 and add to one ability check.

spells.name: Light
spells.desc: Touch one object no larger than 10 feet. It sheds bright light in 20-foot radius and dim light 40 feet. Hostile creature must make DEX save to avoid.

spells.name: Mage Hand
spells.desc: Create a spectral floating hand. Manipulate objects, open containers, retrieve items, pour liquids. Can't attack, activate magic items, or carry more than 10 pounds.

spells.name: Mending
spells.desc: Repair a single break or tear in an object you touch, such as a broken key, torn cloak, or leaking wineskin. As long as the break is no larger than 1 foot.

spells.name: Message
spells.desc: Point finger at creature and whisper a message. Target hears and can whisper reply only you hear. Can pass through barriers if you know target's location.

spells.name: Minor Illusion
spells.desc: Create a sound or image of an object. Sound from whisper to scream. Image no larger than 5-foot cube. Investigation check to discern it's an illusion.

spells.name: Poison Spray
spells.desc: Extend hand and project puff of gas. Target must succeed on CON save or take 1d12 poison damage. Damage increases at higher levels.

spells.name: Prestidigitation
spells.desc: Magical trick: create harmless sensory effects, light/snuff small flame, clean/soil object, chill/warm/flavor material, color or mark object, create trinket or illusory image.

spells.name: Sacred Flame
spells.desc: Flame-like radiance descends. Target must succeed on DEX save or take 1d8 radiant damage. No benefit from cover. Damage increases at higher levels.

spells.name: Shillelagh
spells.desc: Wood of club or quarterstaff is imbued with nature's power. For duration, use spellcasting ability instead of STR for attacks, and die becomes d8.

spells.name: Shocking Grasp
spells.desc: Lightning springs from your hand. Make melee spell attack (advantage vs. metal armor). On hit, 1d8 lightning damage and target can't take reactions until start of its next turn.

spells.name: Spare the Dying
spells.desc: Touch a living creature at 0 HP. The creature becomes stable. Has no effect on undead or constructs.

spells.name: Thaumaturgy
spells.desc: Manifest minor wonder: voice booms, flames flicker or change color, harmless tremor, sound of thunder, unlock unbarred door, eyes turn black. Up to three simultaneous effects.

spells.name: True Strike
spells.desc: Point finger and your magic grants insight into target's defenses. On your next turn, you have advantage on your first attack roll against target.

spells.name: Vicious Mockery
spells.desc: Unleash magically laden insults. Target must succeed on WIS save or take 1d4 psychic damage and have disadvantage on next attack roll. Damage increases at higher levels.

spells.name: Alarm
spells.desc: Set an alarm against unwanted intrusion. Choose a door, window, or area. Alert triggers when Tiny or larger creature touches or enters the warded area.

spells.name: Bane
spells.desc: Up to three creatures must make CHA saves. Failures subtract 1d4 from attack rolls and saving throws for the duration.

spells.name: Bless
spells.desc: Bless up to three creatures. Each adds 1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws. Higher slots: one additional creature per slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Burning Hands
spells.desc: Spread fingers and thumbs. Shoot jets of flame. Each creature in 15-foot cone: DEX save or 3d6 fire damage, half on success. Higher slots: +1d6 per level.

spells.name: Charm Person
spells.desc: Attempt to charm a humanoid. Target makes WIS save (advantage if in combat). Charmed target regards you as friendly. Knows it was charmed when spell ends.

spells.name: Color Spray
spells.desc: Brilliant multicolored light. Roll 6d10; blind creatures with that many HP starting from lowest. Higher slots: +2d10 per level.

spells.name: Command
spells.desc: Speak a one-word command to a creature. On failed WIS save, follow command: Approach, Drop, Flee, Grovel, or Halt. Higher slots: one additional creature per level.

spells.name: Cure Wounds
spells.desc: Touch creature and restore 1d8 + spellcasting modifier HP. No effect on undead or constructs. Higher slots: +1d8 per level.

spells.name: Detect Magic
spells.desc: Sense the presence of magic within 30 feet. See a faint aura around visible magical objects or creatures, and learn the school of magic if any.

spells.name: Disguise Self
spells.desc: Make yourself look different: height, weight, features, clothing. Can't change body type fundamentally. Investigation check to see through illusion.

spells.name: Divine Favor
spells.desc: Your prayer empowers you. Until spell ends, your weapon attacks deal +1d4 radiant damage on hit.

spells.name: Expeditious Retreat
spells.desc: Take the Dash action as a bonus action on each of your turns until the spell ends.

spells.name: False Life
spells.desc: Bolstered by necromantic energy, gain 1d4+4 temporary hit points. Higher slots: +5 temp HP per level.

spells.name: Feather Fall
spells.desc: Choose up to five falling creatures. Rate of descent slows to 60 feet per round. Creature takes no damage from falling for the duration.

spells.name: Find Familiar
spells.desc: Gain service of a familiar: bat, cat, crab, frog, hawk, lizard, octopus, owl, poisonous snake, fish, rat, raven, sea horse, spider, or weasel.

spells.name: Fog Cloud
spells.desc: Create a 20-foot-radius sphere of fog centered on a point. The sphere spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. Higher slots: +20-foot radius per level.

spells.name: Goodberry
spells.desc: Up to ten berries appear infused with magic. For 24 hours, a creature can use an action to eat one berry. It restores 1 HP and provides sustenance for a day.

spells.name: Grease
spells.desc: Slick grease covers the ground in 10-foot square. Becomes difficult terrain. Creatures in area must succeed on DEX save or fall prone. Entering area: same save.

spells.name: Healing Word
spells.desc: Creature you can see regains 1d4 + spellcasting modifier HP. Higher slots: +1d4 per level.

spells.name: Hellish Rebuke
spells.desc: React when hit by an attacker within 60 feet. Engulf attacker in hellfire: DEX save or 2d10 fire damage, half on success. Higher slots: +1d10 per level.

spells.name: Heroism
spells.desc: Willing creature becomes imbued with bravery. Immune to frightened, and gains temp HP equal to spellcasting modifier at start of each turn. Higher slots: one more creature per level.

spells.name: Hunter's Mark
spells.desc: Choose creature. Deal extra 1d6 damage on hits. Advantage on Perception and Survival checks to track. Can move mark to new creature if target dies. Higher slots: 8h/24h duration.

spells.name: Identify
spells.desc: Choose one object. Learn what spells are affecting it or if it's magic, its properties and how to use them, and whether it requires attunement and how many charges remain.

spells.name: Inflict Wounds
spells.desc: Make a melee spell attack. On hit, 3d10 necrotic damage. Higher slots: +1d10 per level.

spells.name: Jump
spells.desc: Triple the jump distance of a willing creature you touch.

spells.name: Longstrider
spells.desc: Touch a creature. Speed increases by 10 feet until spell ends. Higher slots: one additional creature per level.

spells.name: Mage Armor
spells.desc: Touch willing creature not wearing armor. AC becomes 13 + DEX modifier. Spell ends if creature dons armor or you dismiss it.

spells.name: Magic Missile
spells.desc: Create three darts of magical force, each hitting a target for 1d4+1 force damage. Auto-hits. Higher slots: +1 dart per level.

spells.name: Protection from Evil and Good
spells.desc: Protect against aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, undead. Attacks from these have disadvantage. Can't be charmed, frightened, or possessed by them.

spells.name: Ray of Sickness
spells.desc: Make ranged spell attack. On hit, 2d8 poison damage and target must make CON save or be Poisoned until end of next turn. Higher slots: +1d8 per level.

spells.name: Shield
spells.desc: React when hit or targeted by Magic Missile. Invisible barrier of force. +5 AC until start of next turn. Negates Magic Missile automatically.

spells.name: Shield of Faith
spells.desc: Shimmering field appears around willing creature, granting +2 AC for the duration.

spells.name: Silent Image
spells.desc: Create a visual illusion of an object, creature, or phenomenon no larger than 15-foot cube. Image has no sound, smell, texture, or temperature.

spells.name: Sleep
spells.desc: Roll 5d8; put creatures to sleep starting from fewest HP. Doesn't affect undead, immune creatures. Higher slots: +2d8 per level.

spells.name: Thunderwave
spells.desc: Wave of thunder force. Creatures in 15-foot cube: CON save or 2d8 thunder damage and pushed 10 feet, half damage on success. Objects pushed 10 feet. Loud boom. Higher slots: +1d8 per level.

spells.name: Unseen Servant
spells.desc: Invisible mindless undirected force. AC 10, 1 HP, STR 2. Perform simple tasks: fetch, clean, mend, carry, hold, pour, move. Can't attack or carry more than 10 pounds.

spells.name: Witch Bolt
spells.desc: Crackling blue lightning bolt. Make ranged spell attack. On hit, 1d12 lightning damage. Each subsequent turn, use action to deal 1d12 automatically. Higher slots: +1d12 per level.

spells.name: Aid
spells.desc: Up to three creatures gain 5 extra HP max and current HP. Higher slots: +5 HP per level above 2nd.

spells.name: Alter Self
spells.desc: Assume a different form: Aquatic Adaptation (breathe water, swim speed), Change Appearance (look like another creature), or Natural Weapons (claws, bite, etc. deal 1d6+STR).

spells.name: Arcane Lock
spells.desc: Touch closed door, window, gate, chest, or other enterable object. It becomes locked for duration. DC to break/pick increases by 10. You and designated creatures can open it freely.

spells.name: Blindness/Deafness
spells.desc: CON save or target is blinded or deafened. Repeats save at end of each turn. Higher slots: one additional target per level above 2nd.

spells.name: Blur
spells.desc: Your body becomes blurred and shifts and wavers to all who can see you. Attackers have disadvantage on attack rolls against you. Creatures with truesight are unaffected.

spells.name: Calm Emotions
spells.desc: Each humanoid in 20-foot-radius sphere: CHA save or suppress charmed/frightened conditions, or become indifferent about hostile creatures (while not threatened).

spells.name: Crown of Madness
spells.desc: One humanoid must make WIS save or become charmed. Jagged crown of iron appears. Use action each turn to direct target to make melee attack against a creature other than itself.

spells.name: Darkness
spells.desc: Magical darkness spreads from point in 15-foot radius. Even darkvision can't penetrate it unless magical. Can attach to object or leave stationary.

spells.name: Darkvision
spells.desc: Touch willing creature. Gain darkvision out to 60 feet for the duration.

spells.name: Enhance Ability
spells.desc: Give a creature magical enhancement. Bear's Endurance (CON, d6 temp HP), Bull's Strength (STR, double carry), Cat's Grace (DEX, no fall damage), Eagle's Splendor (CHA), Fox's Cunning (INT), Owl's Wisdom (WIS). All grant advantage on related checks.

spells.name: Find Traps
spells.desc: Sense the presence of any trap within range that is within line of sight. Sense general nature of the danger but not exact location or how to disarm it.

spells.name: Flaming Sphere
spells.desc: 5-foot-diameter sphere of fire appears. DEX save or 2d6 fire damage (half on success) for creatures within 5 feet. Bonus action to move up to 30 feet. Higher slots: +1d6 per level.

spells.name: Hold Person
spells.desc: Humanoid must make WIS save or be paralyzed. Repeats save each turn. Attacks within 5 feet that hit are critical hits. Higher slots: one additional target per level above 2nd.

spells.name: Invisibility
spells.desc: Creature you touch becomes invisible until it attacks or casts a spell. Higher slots: one additional creature per level above 2nd.

spells.name: Knock
spells.desc: Choose object in range that is locked, stuck, or barred. The object opens. Sets off loud knock audible from 300 feet.

spells.name: Levitate
spells.desc: One creature or object of up to 500 pounds rises up to 20 feet and remains there. Target can move only by pushing or pulling against a fixed object. Can lower/rise 20 feet per turn.

spells.name: Magic Weapon
spells.desc: Touch a nonmagical weapon. It becomes magical, gaining +1 to attack and damage rolls. Higher slots: 3rd–4th is +1, 5th–6th is +2, 7th+ is +3.

spells.name: Mirror Image
spells.desc: Three illusory duplicates of yourself appear. When attacked, roll d20. 6+ redirect to duplicate; duplicate destroyed. 3 duplicates: 6+. 2: 8+. 1: 11+.

spells.name: Misty Step
spells.desc: Briefly surrounded by silvery mist, teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

spells.name: Pass without Trace
spells.desc: Veil of shadows and silence radiates from you. Each creature you choose within 30 feet gains +10 to Stealth checks and can't be tracked except by magical means.

spells.name: Prayer of Healing
spells.desc: Up to six creatures regain 2d8 + spellcasting modifier HP. Higher slots: +1d8 per level above 2nd.

spells.name: Scorching Ray
spells.desc: Create three rays. Make ranged spell attack for each. On hit: 2d6 fire damage. Higher slots: one additional ray per level above 2nd.

spells.name: See Invisibility
spells.desc: See invisible creatures and objects as if visible, and see into the Ethereal Plane.

spells.name: Shatter
spells.desc: Sudden loud ringing noise in 10-foot-radius sphere. CON save or 3d8 thunder damage, half on success. Automatic damage to objects in area. Higher slots: +1d8 per level.

spells.name: Silence
spells.desc: No sound can be created within or pass through a 20-foot-radius sphere. Immunity to thunder damage in area, and spells with verbal components can't be cast.

spells.name: Spider Climb
spells.desc: Touch willing creature. Gains ability to climb difficult surfaces including ceilings without an ability check, and has a climbing speed equal to its walking speed.

spells.name: Spiritual Weapon
spells.desc: Create floating spectral weapon. Bonus action to move up to 20 feet and attack. Melee spell attack for 1d8 + spellcasting modifier force damage. Higher slots: +1d8 per 2 levels above 2nd.

spells.name: Suggestion
spells.desc: Suggest a course of activity in one or two sentences. Target must make WIS save or follow suggestion to the best of its ability. Must be phrased to sound reasonable.

spells.name: Web
spells.desc: Thick, sticky webs fill a 20-foot cube. Difficult terrain. Any creature in area or entering makes DEX save or restrained. Restrained creature can use action to make STR save to escape. Flammable.

spells.name: Animate Dead
spells.desc: Create an undead servant (skeleton or zombie) from pile of bones or corpse. Under your command for 24 hours. Repeat ritual to maintain control. Higher slots: two additional undead per level above 3rd.

spells.name: Bestow Curse
spells.desc: Touch creature. WIS save or cursed. Choose: disadvantage on ability checks/saves for chosen ability, disadvantage on attacks against you, waste action on turn (WIS save), or +1d8 necrotic on hits. Higher slots: 4th=10m, 5th=8h(no conc), 7th=24h, 9th=permanent.

spells.name: Blink
spells.desc: Roll d20 at end of each turn. 11+ vanish and appear on Ethereal Plane. At start of next turn, roll d20: 11+ return to an unoccupied space near where you left.

spells.name: Call Lightning
spells.desc: Storm cloud appears in a 10-foot cylinder, 60-foot radius. Action to call lightning: choose point, creatures in 5-foot radius make DEX save or 3d10 lightning damage. Outdoors in storm: 4d10. Higher slots: +1d10 per level.

spells.name: Clairvoyance
spells.desc: Create invisible sensor at familiar location within range. Either see or hear through sensor. Can switch between senses each action.

spells.name: Counterspell
spells.desc: React when seeing creature within 60 feet casting a spell. Automatically interrupt spell if 3rd level or lower. If 4th level or higher, ability check with DC = 10 + spell's level.

spells.name: Dispel Magic
spells.desc: Choose creature, object, or effect. All 3rd-level spells automatically end. For each higher spell, ability check: DC = 10 + spell's level. Higher slots: auto-end up to same level.

spells.name: Fear
spells.desc: Each creature in 30-foot cone must make WIS save or be frightened. Frightened creature must dash away and can't take reactions. Drops held objects. Save again each turn if can't see you.

spells.name: Fireball
spells.desc: Bright streak then explosion. Each creature in 20-foot-radius sphere: DEX save or 8d6 fire damage, half on success. Spreads around corners. Higher slots: +1d6 per level above 3rd.

spells.name: Fly
spells.desc: Touch willing creature. Gains flying speed of 60 feet. Falls if spell ends while still aloft. Higher slots: one additional target per level above 3rd.

spells.name: Haste
spells.desc: Willing creature gains doubled speed, +2 AC, advantage on DEX saves, and an additional action (Attack, Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Use object). Lethargic for 1 turn after.

spells.name: Hypnotic Pattern
spells.desc: Twisting pattern in 30-foot cube. Each creature: WIS save or charmed. Charmed creature is incapacitated and speed 0. Condition ends if they take damage or someone wakes them.

spells.name: Lightning Bolt
spells.desc: Stroke of lightning in 100-foot-long, 5-foot-wide line. DEX save or 8d6 lightning damage, half on success. Higher slots: +1d6 per level above 3rd.

spells.name: Mass Healing Word
spells.desc: Up to six creatures regain 1d4 + spellcasting modifier HP. Higher slots: +1d4 per level above 3rd.

spells.name: Phantom Steed
spells.desc: Large quasi-real horse-like creature appears. Speed 100 feet. Only you can use it. Disappears if takes damage. Leaves no tracks.

spells.name: Protection from Energy
spells.desc: Resistance to one damage type (acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder) for willing creature you touch.

spells.name: Revivify
spells.desc: Touch a creature that has died within the last minute. It returns to life with 1 HP. Cannot restore to life if dead from old age. Material component: 300gp diamond consumed.

spells.name: Slow
spells.desc: Up to six creatures in 40-foot cube: WIS save or slowed. Half speed, -2 AC, can't use reactions. On turn: either action or bonus action. Spells: roll d20; on 11+ cast next turn.

spells.name: Spirit Guardians
spells.desc: Call spirits to protect you. Choose radiant/necrotic. Area is difficult terrain for enemies. When hostile creature enters or starts turn in area: WIS save or 3d8 damage, half on success. Higher slots: +1d8 per level.

spells.name: Vampiric Touch
spells.desc: Grasp crackles with negative energy. Melee spell attack: 3d6 necrotic damage. Regain HP equal to half. Higher slots: +1d6 per level.

spells.name: Banishment
spells.desc: CHA save or banished. Natives of current plane: incapacitated in demiplane. Non-natives: return to origin. If spell ends, creature returns. Higher slots: one additional target per level.

spells.name: Blight
spells.desc: CON save or 8d8 necrotic damage, half on success. Plants automatically fail and take maximum damage. Higher slots: +1d8 per level.

spells.name: Confusion
spells.desc: Creatures in 10-foot-radius sphere: WIS save or affected. Roll d10 at start of each turn to determine behavior: wander, do nothing, attack nearest, act normally. Higher slots: one additional 10-foot radius per level.

spells.name: Death Ward
spells.desc: Touch a creature. First time it would drop to 0 HP, it drops to 1 HP instead and spell ends. If subjected to effect that would kill instantly, that is negated and spell ends.

spells.name: Dimension Door
spells.desc: Teleport to any location within range you can see or envision. Can bring one willing creature that fits in your space. Appear in exact spot. If space is occupied: 4d6 force damage to both and don't teleport.

spells.name: Divination
spells.desc: Contact divine being and get truthful reply about a specific goal, event, or activity to occur within 7 days. Short phrase or yes/no answer. Works once before becoming unreliable.

spells.name: Fire Shield
spells.desc: Thin layer of flames: warm (resists cold, deals 2d8 fire) or chill (resists fire, deals 2d8 cold) to melee attackers.

spells.name: Greater Invisibility
spells.desc: Creature remains invisible even when attacking or casting spells. Duration 1 minute.

spells.name: Ice Storm
spells.desc: Hail in a 20-foot radius, 40-foot high cylinder. DEX save or 2d8 bludgeoning + 4d6 cold damage, half on success. Area becomes difficult terrain. Higher slots: +1d8 bludgeoning per level.

spells.name: Polymorph
spells.desc: Transform creature into new form. WIS save for unwilling. New form can be any beast with CR equal to or lower than target's CR or level. Stats replaced, mind retained.

spells.name: Stone Shape
spells.desc: Touch stone and form it into any shape. Make a stone weapon, seal a door, reshape a statue. Only work with Medium or smaller volume of stone.

spells.name: Stoneskin
spells.desc: Flesh becomes hard as stone. Resistance to nonmagical bludgeoning, piercing, slashing damage. Material: 100gp diamond dust consumed.

spells.name: Wall of Fire
spells.desc: Wall of fire on solid surface up to 60 feet long, 20 feet high, 1 foot thick. Opaque. Each creature ending turn in or within 10 feet of dangerous side: 5d8 fire damage. Higher slots: +1d8 per level.

spells.name: Animate Objects
spells.desc: Animate up to 10 nonmagical objects. Tiny(10): 20hp, +8 atk, 1d4+4. Small(5): 25hp, +6 atk, 1d8+2. Medium(2): 40hp, +5 atk, 2d6+1. Large(1): 50hp, +6 atk, 2d10+2. Higher slots: 2 additional per level.

spells.name: Bigby's Hand
spells.desc: Large hand of shimmering force appears. Clenched Fist: 4d8 force damage. Forceful Hand: push creature 5 feet per 5 by which it failed STR check. Grasping Hand: grapple, squeeze for 2d6+INT. Interposing Hand: impose disadvantage on attacks against you.

spells.name: Cloudkill
spells.desc: Yellow-green fog in 20-foot radius sphere. Heavily obscured. CON save or 5d8 poison damage, half on success, at start of each turn in area. Fog moves 10 feet away from you each turn. Higher slots: +1d8 per level.

spells.name: Cone of Cold
spells.desc: Blast of cold air in 60-foot cone. CON save or 8d8 cold damage, half on success. Killed creatures become frozen statues. Higher slots: +1d8 per level.

spells.name: Dominate Person
spells.desc: Humanoid must make WIS save or be charmed. Telepathic link, can issue commands (no action). Target can repeat save each time it takes damage. Higher slots: 6th=10m, 7th=1h, 8th+=8h.

spells.name: Hold Monster
spells.desc: WIS save or paralyzed. Repeats save each turn. Attacks within 5 feet auto-crit. Higher slots: one additional target per level above 5th.

spells.name: Legend Lore
spells.desc: Name or describe person, place, or object. Gain knowledge about it in the form of a legend. Can reveal hidden secrets, divine history, or forgotten lore.

spells.name: Mass Cure Wounds
spells.desc: Up to six creatures in 30-foot-radius sphere regain 3d8 + spellcasting modifier HP. Higher slots: +1d8 per level.

spells.name: Passwall
spells.desc: Passage forms in wooden, plaster, or stone wall up to 20 feet deep, 5 feet wide, 8 feet tall. Invisible from outside wall.

spells.name: Telekinesis
spells.desc: Move creature or object up to 1000 lbs. up to 30 feet. Creature: STR save or moved and restrained. Object: freely manipulate up to 30 feet.

spells.name: Teleportation Circle
spells.desc: 5-foot-diameter circle connects to permanent teleportation circle you know. Costs 50gp material consumed. Anyone stepping through reaches destination.

spells.name: Wall of Force
spells.desc: Invisible wall of force up to ten 10-foot-by-10-foot panels. Immune to all damage and Disintegrate. Nothing can pass through.

spells.name: Chain Lightning
spells.desc: Lightning bolt strikes primary target: DEX save or 10d8 damage, half on success. Leaps to 3 other creatures within 30 feet. Higher slots: one additional secondary target per level.

spells.name: Circle of Death
spells.desc: Sphere of negative energy ripples out in 60-foot radius. CON save or 8d6 necrotic damage, half on success. Higher slots: +2d6 per level above 6th.

spells.name: Disintegrate
spells.desc: Thin green ray. DEX save or 10d6+40 force damage. If reduced to 0, disintegrated (only ash). Objects and structures automatically fail. Higher slots: +3d6+10 per level.

spells.name: Flesh to Stone
spells.desc: CON save or restrained. Repeat saves each turn. Three failures: permanently petrified. Three successes: immune for 24 hours. Greater Restoration can cure.

spells.name: Globe of Invulnerability
spells.desc: Shimmering barrier. Any spell of 5th level or lower cast from outside the barrier can't affect creatures inside. Higher slots: increase max level by 1 per level above 6th.

spells.name: Mass Suggestion
spells.desc: Up to twelve creatures must make WIS save or follow a reasonable suggestion. Higher slots: 7th=10 days, 8th=30 days, 9th=1 year+1 day.

spells.name: True Seeing
spells.desc: Grant creature truesight, notices secret doors hidden by magic, and see into Ethereal Plane, all up to 120 feet.

spells.name: Delayed Blast Fireball
spells.desc: Glowing bead of yellow energy explodes at end of duration or when you detonated. 12d6 fire damage + 1d6 per round before detonation. Can be intercepted. Higher slots: +1d6 initial per level.

spells.name: Finger of Death
spells.desc: CON save or 7d8+30 necrotic damage, half on success. Humanoid killed by this rises next turn as zombie permanently under your command.

spells.name: Forcecage
spells.desc: Immovable, invisible cube of force. Either box (20 feet) or cage (barred, 20 feet). Can't be dispelled by Dispel Magic. Must use Disintegrate or anti-magic to escape.

spells.name: Plane Shift
spells.desc: Transport yourself and up to eight willing creatures to another plane. As attack: melee spell attack, on hit target makes CHA save or banished to random location on another plane.

spells.name: Power Word Pain
spells.desc: Utter word of power that overwhelms the mind with intense pain. Until pain ends: speed halved, disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks, concentration saves with disadvantage, can't take reactions. At start of each turn: CON save to end.

spells.name: Teleport
spells.desc: Teleport yourself and up to 8 willing creatures to destination. Familiarity determines accuracy: permanent circle (on target), associated object, very familiar, familiar, seen casually, viewed once, description, or false destination.

spells.name: Antimagic Field
spells.desc: Invisible sphere of antimagic surrounds you. Suppresses magic within it. Spells and other magical effects can't extend into it. Magic items don't work inside.

spells.name: Clone
spells.desc: Grow inert duplicate of a living creature. If original dies, soul transfers to clone. Clone matures in 120 days. Material: 1000gp diamond vessel.

spells.name: Dominate Monster
spells.desc: WIS save or charmed. Telepathic link, issue commands. Repeat save each time takes damage. 9th level: 8 hours duration.

spells.name: Feeblemind
spells.desc: INT and CHA drop to 1. Target can't cast spells, activate magic items, or comprehend language. Can repeat INT save every 30 days. Greater Restoration can end it.

spells.name: Glibness
spells.desc: Until spell ends: replace any Deception roll with 15. Magic can't determine if lying. CHA instead of any ability for Charisma checks.

spells.name: Mind Blank
spells.desc: Immune to psychic damage, mind-reading, detect thoughts, charm, frightened, Divination spells, and even the Wish spell.

spells.name: Power Word Stun
spells.desc: Word that overpowers mind of one creature with 150 HP or fewer. Stunned. CON save at end of each turn to end the condition.

spells.name: Tsunami
spells.desc: Wall of water up to 300 feet long, 300 feet high, 50 feet thick. STR save or 6d10 bludgeoning damage and carried with wall. Wall moves 50 feet away from you each turn.

spells.name: Astral Projection
spells.desc: Project astral body into Astral Plane, leaving physical body behind. Take up to 8 willing creatures. Each gains astral body. Silver cord connects to physical body.

spells.name: Foresight
spells.desc: Can't be surprised. Advantage on attacks, ability checks, saving throws. All attacks against target have disadvantage.

spells.name: Gate
spells.desc: Portal linking current plane to specific location on another plane. You can name a specific creature known to you. 100% chance it notices and can choose to travel through.

spells.name: Meteor Swarm
spells.desc: Four 40-foot-radius spheres fall. Each: DEX save or 20d6 fire + 20d6 bludgeoning, half on success. Spheres can't overlap.

spells.name: Power Word Kill
spells.desc: Speak word of power that compels a creature with 100 HP or fewer to die instantly. Immune to creatures with more HP.

spells.name: Time Stop
spells.desc: Briefly stop the flow of time. Take 1d4+1 turns in a row. Other creatures can't act. Spell ends early if you affect a creature or object.

spells.name: True Resurrection
spells.desc: Touch a creature dead up to 200 years (not from old age). Creature returns fully restored with new body if needed. Can even restore a creature reduced to dust. Material: 25000gp diamond.

spells.name: Wish
spells.desc: Most powerful mortal spell. Duplicate any spell of 8th level or lower, or create effect of similar power. Overuse causes stress: 1d10 necrotic, 33% chance never able to cast Wish again.
